title: 12 Pack Pest Trap Boards, Sticky Traps Glue Pads Multi Insects Sticky Traps Glue Pads Large Strong Sticky Trap Pad And Boards for Indoor Outdoor Home Kitchen Garden, 6 x 8.8 inch
features: High Quality：These mouse sticky pads feature super-strong adhesive and foldable cardboard that captures pests instantly, making them an efficient solution for keeping your home pest-free.

Sticky Mouse Traps: Contain 12-Pack Pest Sticky Glue Boards Keep your home pest-free. Size: 6 x 8.8 inch. Open size: 12 x 8.8 inch.Evenly distributed. Making it easier to catch pest.(Note: Avoid direct contact with the sticky surface and keep out of reach of children and pets.)

Foldable Design：These sticky traps can be used flat or folded into various shapes, such as L-shape, U-shape, and hole shape, for customized pest control. With multi-corner coverage, they are perfect for thorough pest elimination in hard-to-reach areas like corners, behind appliances, and more.

Easy to Use: Just separate the two boards, put some baits on the middle of pest glue traps indoor and place the sticky pest trap along a wall where pest like to travel. If using the sticky trap in an area with dust or other debris, fold the insect and insect sticky trap into a tunnel to protect the sticky trap.

Wide Application: This pest traps are an effective way to trap insects. Can easily used for mouse/pest /cockroaches/flies/bugs/spiders/stink bugs and other pests. It can be used in kitchen, office, bedroom, garden, restroom, restaurant, indoors, outdoors.
description: Our sticky traps come in convenient 12-packs measuring 6 x 8.8 inch. Our sticky mouse traps are coated with highly effective mouse glue that securely holds mice and other pests. No escape – for a hygienic, pest-free home. The traps are also highly effective in restaurants, offices, hospitals, and other commercial spaces where pests are common. Great for controlling pests in areas where traditional insecticides are impractical. Note: Avoid direct contact with the sticky surface and keep out of reach of children and pets.
